name: Legacy Pro V2 Replacement Screens 6-Pack
summary: The AirVape Legacy Pro V2 replacement screens are designed to maintain clean airflow and consistent performance.
description: The AirVape Legacy Pro V2 replacement screens are designed to maintain clean airflow and consistent performance. These screens help contain material while allowing smooth vapour flow. Made from durable, heat-resistant mesh, they prevent debris entering the airpath and support efficient device performance. A simple solution for regular maintenance. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
